description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with build and test stages using Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15 (Xcode 16), and Windows runners. Define a .Compress_And_Upload_Symbols_Base job that runs on Ubuntu, installs apt packages curl gcab unzip, downloads and installs AWS CLI, extracts the sym_store zip, creates .ex_, .dl_, .pd_ archives with gcab, and uploads them to S3 when AWS credentials are present; this job is extended by Windows_Compress_And_Upload_Symbols_* jobs which depend on the matching Windows build artifacts. Add a .FindMissingMergeRequests job using python:latest that installs requests click discord_webhook and runs a Python script on schedule. Add a .MacOS job that builds a macOS dmg using ccache, Homebrew, CI scripts, renames the dmg with identifiers, and optionally uploads it to S3 via s3cmd. Add a .Ubuntu job that builds on Ubuntu with ccache, runs cmake build and install, optionally runs tests and gcovr coverage, and publishes install artifacts; similarly add .Ubuntu_AndroidNDK_arm64-v8a, .Ubuntu_Clang_Tidy_Base, .Ubuntu_Clang_tests, .Ubuntu_GCC_tests_Debug, .Ubuntu_GCC_tests_tsan, .Ubuntu_Static_Deps, .Ubuntu_Static_Deps_tests, and .Ubuntu_integration_tests_base jobs each with their specific images, before_scripts, caches, variables, rules (push, merge request, schedule) and artifacts, and all jobs upload symbols or build artifacts to an S3 bucket as their deployment target.
